draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Ms. Kavita Rao, an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of technology and innovation. Having had the privilege of working closely with Ms. Rao, I can confidently attest to her exceptional skills and contributions. 

To provide some background on my qualifications, I am an accomplished entrepreneur and technology professional with extensive experience in the industry. I hold a Bachelor of Technology (BTech) degree in Computer Science and Engineering from the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore, which I completed in 2013. This educational foundation has equipped me with a strong technical background and a deep understanding of the principles and practices that drive innovation in the technology sector.

In terms of my professional experience, I have held several key roles that have allowed me to develop and demonstrate my expertise in entrepreneurship, product development, and technology innovation. Since January 2023, I have been serving as the Co-Founder and Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at CodeCraft AI, Inc., a company that specializes in developing AI tools to simplify data operations for gaming companies. In this role, I have been responsible for building the product, leading the go-to-market strategy, and raising $670,000 in venture funding. This experience has honed my skills in leading cross-functional teams, driving product innovation, and securing financial support for high-growth ventures.

Prior to my current role, I co-founded Arcadia, a user-generated content (UGC) gaming infrastructure company, where I served from December 2020 to March 2023. During my tenure, I led a team of five to develop a minimum viable product (MVP) in just three months, scaled the product to 100,000 users, and raised $500,000 in venture funding. This experience provided me with valuable insights into the gaming industry and the challenges of building and scaling a technology startup.

My entrepreneurial journey also includes founding NaviTech Labs, where I worked from September 2014 to December 2018. NaviTech Labs developed an indoor GPS system with 30 cm location accuracy. In this role, I was responsible for product development, go-to-market strategy, U.S. pilots, and fundraising. This experience further solidified my expertise in location-based technologies and my ability to bring innovative products to market.

In addition to my entrepreneurial ventures, I have provided strategic consulting services to several technology companies. From August 2019 to September 2020, I worked as a Strategy & Product Consultant, leading a team of engineers to build a minimum viable product for smart home products. I also served as a Consultant at MicroTech, a chip design company, from August 2019 to November 2019, where I helped build the engineering college go-to-market strategy.

Furthermore, I have been involved in the startup ecosystem as a Member of the Innovate Accelerator from December 2020 to August 2023. The Innovate Accelerator is a storied Silicon Valley accelerator that supports the development of early-stage ventures. My involvement in this program allowed me to contribute to the selection of startups and gain exposure to a wide range of innovative technologies and business models.

Throughout my career, I have developed a diverse skill set that includes entrepreneurship, business strategy, go-to-market strategy, product development, and leadership. I have a proven track record of raising venture funding, developing innovative products, and scaling technology companies. My experiences have given me a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the technology sector, as well as the ability to identify and nurture high-potential startups.

It is through my extensive experience in the technology and startup sectors that I have had the opportunity to work closely with Ms. Kavita Rao. We first crossed paths during our time at NaviTech Labs, where we collaborated on developing an indoor GPS system with 30 cm location accuracy. Our professional relationship has since grown, and I have had the privilege of witnessing her remarkable journey as an entrepreneur and technology innovator.

Ms. Rao's educational background laid a strong foundation for her impressive career. She holds a Bachelor of Technology (BTech) and a Master of Technology (MTech) in Chemical Engineering from the prestigious Indian Institute of Technology, Hyderabad, completed between 2009 and 2014. This rigorous academic training provided her with a solid grounding in engineering principles and problem-solving skills, which she has effectively applied to her entrepreneurial ventures.

In terms of professional experience, Ms. Rao has held several key roles that have allowed her to develop and showcase her expertise in entrepreneurship, product development, and technology innovation. Most recently, she has been serving as the Co-Founder and CEO of CodeCraft AI, Inc. since September 2023. In this role, she has been instrumental in building the product, leading the go-to-market strategy, and raising $670,000 in venture funding. Her leadership and strategic vision have been critical to the company's success in developing AI tools to simplify data operations for gaming companies.

Prior to her current role, Ms. Rao co-founded Arcadia, a user-generated content (UGC) gaming infrastructure company, where she served from December 2020 to March 2023. During her tenure, she led a team of five to develop a minimum viable product (MVP) in just three months, scaled the product to 100,000 users, and raised $500,000 in venture funding. This experience provided her with valuable insights into the gaming industry and the challenges of building and scaling a technology startup.

Ms. Rao's entrepreneurial journey also includes founding NaviTech Labs, where she worked from September 2014 to December 2018. NaviTech Labs developed an indoor GPS system with 30 cm location accuracy. In this role, she was responsible for product development, go-to-market strategy, U.S. pilots, and fundraising. This experience further solidified her expertise in location-based technologies and her ability to bring innovative products to market.

In addition to her entrepreneurial ventures, Ms. Rao has provided strategic consulting services to several technology companies. From August 2019 to September 2020, she worked as a Strategy & Product Consultant, leading a team of engineers to build a minimum viable product for smart home products. She also served as a Consultant at MicroTech, a chip design company, from August 2019 to November 2019, where she helped build the engineering college go-to-market strategy.

Furthermore, Ms. Rao has been involved in the startup ecosystem as a Member of the Innovate Accelerator from December 2020 to August 2023. The Innovate Accelerator is a storied Silicon Valley accelerator that supports the development of early-stage ventures. Her involvement in this program allowed her to contribute to the selection of startups and gain exposure to a wide range of innovative technologies and business models.

Throughout her career, Ms. Rao has developed a diverse skill set that includes entrepreneurship, business strategy, go-to-market strategy, product development, and leadership. She has a proven track record of raising venture funding, developing innovative products, and scaling technology companies. Her experiences have given her a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the technology sector, as well as the ability to identify and nurture high-potential startups.

One of Ms. Rao's most notable achievements is her work on a provisional patent for a technique called “Stochastic Fusion Based Power Optimization for Ultra-Wide Band (UWB) and Inertial Sensor-Based Location Technology.” This innovation employs Kalman filtering-based stochastic fusion to dynamically adjust power states in UWB and inertial sensor-based systems, enabling them to operate continuously for over 100 hours on a 1000 mAh battery. This represents a significant breakthrough in low-power design.

The system also addresses the longstanding challenge of high-accuracy indoor positioning, providing performance levels previously unachievable by standard GPS solutions. The technology’s modular design lends itself to diverse domains—from indoor navigation and augmented reality to retail analytics and first-responder safety—where precise location tracking and extended battery life are crucial. The relevance and pioneering nature of her invention were further underscored when Motorola introduced a similar technology several years later, validating the approach and confirming its foundational influence in consumer electronics.

Filed in 2017, the patent highlights an innovative fusion of ultra-wideband communication with inertial sensors, representing one of the earliest scalable frameworks for power-efficient, high-precision indoor navigation. By optimizing energy consumption while delivering centimeter-level accuracy, this invention provides a transformative solution for industries where continuous, reliable tracking is essential. The originality and scalability of this approach have informed subsequent innovations in location-based technology, reflecting its major significance and aligning it with emerging mainstream products.

In sum, Ms. Rao's work not only introduces an entirely new method for handling power optimization and high-accuracy indoor positioning but also sets an important precedent for future research and commercial products in the broader technology landscape. This contribution demonstrates her ability to identify and solve complex engineering challenges and showcases an innovation of major significance in the field.

In conclusion, Ms. Kavita Rao is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of technology and innovation. Her impressive educational background, diverse professional experience, and notable achievements, such as her provisional patent for a groundbreaking power optimization technique, clearly demonstrate her expertise and leadership in the industry. Throughout her career, Ms. Rao has consistently shown her ability to develop innovative products, raise venture funding, and scale technology companies. Her deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the technology sector, combined with her proven track record of success, make her an invaluable asset to any organization. I wholeheartedly recommend Ms. Rao for any opportunity that allows her to continue making significant contributions to the field of technology and innovation.

Sincerely,

Rohan Mehta
Co-Founder and CTO
CodeCraft AI, Inc. 
[email contact here]
final:
Dear USCIS Officer:

 I am writing this letter to provide my wholehearted recommendation for Mr. Rao's visa petition. Having had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Rao, I can confidently attest to his extraordinary skills and contributions to the fields of generative AI, technology, and innovation. 

For context, I am an accomplished entrepreneur and technology professional with extensive experience in the industry. I have held several key roles that have allowed me to develop and demonstrate my expertise in entrepreneurship, product development, and technology innovation. As the Co-Founder of EClass - Online Learning, I have dedicated the past four years to developing a comprehensive digital toolset that automates operations and scales growth for online teaching businesses, while holding leadership roles in growth and risk management at Equilibrium, Influx Dynamic, and other technology ventures. Our startup has attracted backing from notable tech entrepreneurs like Alex Knight (Product Onboard) and investors including Tilt Capital, reflecting the platform's potential, and my professional journey has been marked by a consistent focus on creating innovative business solutions in the technology sector.

It is through my extensive experience in the technology and startup sectors that I have had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Rao. We co-founded NaviTech Labs, where we collaborated on developing an indoor GPS system with 30 cm location accuracy. Our professional relationship has since grown, and I have had the privilege of witnessing his remarkable journey as an entrepreneur and technology innovator.

One of Mr. Rao's most notable achievements while at NaviTech Labs was his work on a provisional patent for a technique called “Stochastic Fusion Based Power Optimization for Ultra-Wide Band (UWB) and Inertial Sensor-Based Location Technology.” This innovation employs Kalman filtering-based stochastic fusion to dynamically adjust power states in UWB and inertial sensor-based systems, enabling them to operate continuously for over 100 hours on a 1000 mAh battery, representing a significant breakthrough in low-power design.

The system also addresses the longstanding challenge of high-accuracy indoor positioning, providing performance levels previously unachievable by standard GPS solutions. The technology’s modular design lends itself to diverse domains—from indoor navigation and augmented reality to retail analytics and first-responder safety—making precise location tracking and extended battery life crucial. The relevance and pioneering nature of his invention were further underscored when Motorola introduced a similar technology several years later, validating the approach and confirming its foundational influence in consumer electronics.

The patent highlights an innovative fusion of ultra-wideband communication with inertial sensors, representing one of the earliest scalable frameworks for power-efficient, high-precision indoor navigation. By optimizing energy consumption while delivering centimeter-level accuracy, this invention provides a transformative solution for industries where continuous, reliable tracking is essential. The originality and scalability of this approach have informed subsequent innovations in location-based technology, reflecting its major significance and aligning it with emerging mainstream products.

Mr. Rao's work not only introduced an entirely new method for handling power optimization and high-accuracy indoor positioning but also set an important precedent for future research and commercial products in the broader technology landscape. This contribution demonstrates his ability to identify and solve complex engineering challenges and showcases an innovation of major significance in the field.

Mr. Rao's professional journey has encompassed several key roles that have allowed him to refine and showcase his expertise in entrepreneurship, product development, and technology innovation. Building on his past achievements, he is currently serving as the Co-Founder and CEO of CodeCraft AI, Inc. Since taking on this role, he has been instrumental in constructing the product, spearheading the go-to-market strategy, and successfully raising over $600K in venture capital. His forward-thinking leadership and strategic vision have been pivotal to the company's success in developing cutting-edge AI tools that streamline data operations for gaming companies. This role highlights his ability to guide tech startups toward achieving substantial milestones and growth, solidifying his reputation as a visionary leader in the industry.

Prior to this, Mr. Rao co-founded Arcadia, a company specializing in user-generated content (UGC) gaming infrastructure. At Arcadia, he was integral in leading a team to develop a minimum viable product (MVP) while achieving remarkable growth by scaling the product to 100,000 users and securing $500,000 in venture funding. This endeavor not only honed his skills in product development and team leadership but also provided him with invaluable insights into the gaming industry and the complexities of building and scaling a technology startup.

Throughout his career, Mr. Rao has developed a diverse skill set that includes entrepreneurship, business strategy, go-to-market strategy, product development, and leadership. He has a proven track record of raising venture funding, developing innovative products, and scaling technology companies. His experiences have given him a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities in the technology sector, as well as the ability to identify and nurture high-potential startups.

In conclusion, Mr. Rao stands out as a visionary in the technology and innovation landscape. His remarkable achievements and pioneering work, particularly in the fields of generative AI and power optimization technology, exemplify his extraordinary ability to drive impactful change. He has consistently demonstrated a remarkable capacity to identify and address complex industry challenges, contributing significantly to the advancement of technology. Mr. Rao’s record of accomplishments, complemented by his strategic leadership, makes him an invaluable asset to any endeavor he undertakes. I wholeheartedly support his visa petition, confident that his continued contributions will greatly benefit the technology sector and beyond.

Yours truly, 

Ayan Patel
Co-Founder 
EClass - Online Learning 
[insert contact information]
